scripts.dev:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const d of ['.next','.next-dev']) fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});" && next dev -p 3001
scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const d of ['.next','.next-dev']) fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});" && next build
